title: 50 Pack Party Cups 12 oz Disposable Plastic Cups, Assorted Color Plastic Party Cups for Parties, Events, Game and BBQ
features: Super Value Pack: Get 50 pcs of 12 oz plastic party cups in 5 vibrant colors: Red, Green, Blue, Lemon Yellow, and Purple, 10 of each! Perfect for any party, this colorful set lets your guests pick their favorite hue, ensuring everyone’s happy

Premium Quality: Our 12oz plastic cups are crafted from plastic and are BPA-free, ensuring safety and reliability. Featuring a double-wall design, these 12 oz cups are thick, durable, and to hold plenty of drinks without bending

Easy-To-Grip: These smooth, stackable 12 oz plastic cups glide effortlessly from the stack, never sticking or causing frustration. The sleek horizontal stripe design ensures a comfortable hold, making every sip a breeze

Widely Occasions: 12 oz plastic party cups can be used to serve drinks, snacks, decorations, or any DIY creations. Perfect for parties, celebrations, BBQ parties and more. Our 5-color plastic cups add a vibrant touch to any event

Hassle-Free-Use: Get ready to elevate your party with these amazing vibrant plastic party cups in 5 stunning colors! When the fun’s over, simply toss them – no cleaning needed. More time to enjoy, less time to worry
